PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems
articles.excerpt: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. T
articles.summary: PlanBench-XL 是一个评估 LLM 工具调用智能体在大规模工具生态中长程规划能力的基准。现有基准很少评估在工具可见性受限（检索受限）场景下的规划能力，该工作填补了这一空白，测试智能体发现相关工具、推断隐式子目标、在动态环境中长程自适应的综合能力。

articles.title: OpenRath: Session-Centered Runtime State for Agent Systems
articles.excerpt: Modern agent systems often suffer from fragmented runtime state: transcripts, tool effects, memory events, workspace placement, branch provenance, and replay evidence are recorded separately and become difficult to inspect or reproduce. OpenRath addresses this issue with a PyTorch-like programming m
articles.summary: OpenRath 提出以「会话」为中心的运行时状态管理方案，解决现代智能体系统中对话历史、工具副作用、内存事件、工作区状态、分支来源和回放证据分散存储、难以检查与复现的痛点。其编程模型类似 PyTorch，旨在统一智能体运行时状态的记录与追踪。

articles.title: DataClaw0: Agentic Tailoring Multimodal Data from Raw Streams
articles.excerpt: Massive unstructured multimodal streams suffer from high "data entropy," impeding both efficient human knowledge acquisition and high-quality AI post-training. Existing passive annotation paradigms, heavily reliant on heuristic rules or general VLMs, are costly, monotonous, and fail to unlock the de
articles.summary: DataClaw0 是一个智能体驱动的多模态数据精炼框架，针对大量非结构化多模态流中的高「数据熵」问题。现有被动标注范式依赖启发式规则或通用视觉语言模型，成本高且无法挖掘深层语义；DataClaw0 通过智能体主动裁剪，提升人类知识获取效率与 AI 后训练数据质量。

articles.title: EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions
articles.excerpt: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace s
articles.summary: EnterpriseClawBench 是首个基于真实企业工作场景会话构建的智能体基准，评估智能体读取异构文件、调用工具、交付业务产物的能力。数据集从大量真实职场会话归纳而来，覆盖企业实际部署中智能体面临的多样复杂任务。

articles.title: KaLM-Reranker-V1: Fast but Not Late Interaction for Compressed Document Reranking
articles.excerpt: As retrieval systems scale, high-quality reranking becomes increasingly important. However, most existing rerankers, whether encoder-based or decoder-based, jointly encode the query and passage, tightly coupling their computation and limiting deployment efficiency as well as flexibility. We present
articles.summary: KaLM-Reranker-V1 提出一种用于压缩文档重排序的高效重排序器，打破传统编码器或解码器重排序器将查询与段落紧耦合编码的方式，实现计算解耦，显著提升部署效率与灵活性，同时在检索系统规模扩大时维持高质量重排序效果。

articles.title: World Action Models: A Survey
articles.excerpt: World Action Models (WAMs) are embodied predictive-action models that make a forecast of the future available to action. Recent WAMs repurpose large video generation models, and a parallel line relies on language or vision-language backbones without a video-generation core. This rapid expansion has
articles.summary: 《世界动作模型综述》系统梳理 WAM（World Action Models）这一具身预测-动作模型家族的最新进展。WAM 对未来状态进行预测并将其用于决策，近期方法分为两支：基于大型视频生成模型的路线，以及依托语言或视觉语言骨干（无视频生成核心）的路线，文章对其快速演进进行全面梳理。

articles.title: CLI-Universe: Towards Verifiable Task Synthesis Engine for Terminal Agents
articles.excerpt: While recent LLM-based terminal agents have demonstrated promising capabilities, the scarcity of high-quality, executable training data remains a critical bottleneck. Existing synthesis pipelines typically scale by retrofitting surface-level artifacts into tasks, frequently yielding ambiguous instru
articles.summary: CLI-Universe 构建了一个可验证的任务合成引擎，专门为终端智能体生成高质量可执行训练数据。现有合成流程通过对表层产物进行改造来扩充数据，常产生指令歧义、无法执行等问题；CLI-Universe 通过可验证合成保障数据质量，缓解终端智能体训练数据稀缺的瓶颈。

articles.title: BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language
articles.excerpt: We present BioMatrix, the first multimodal foundation model that natively integrates sequences, structures, and natural language for both molecules and proteins within a single decoder-only architecture. Existing biological foundation models pursue native multimodality and broad entity coverage sepa
articles.summary: BioMatrix 是首个在单一纯解码器架构中原生融合序列、结构和自然语言的多模态生物学基础模型，覆盖分子与蛋白质两类实体。现有生物基础模型在原生多模态与宽泛实体覆盖之间顾此失彼，BioMatrix 首次将两者统一于同一框架内。

articles.title: HydraHead: From Head-Level Functional Heterogeneity to Specialized Attention Hybridization
articles.excerpt: The quadratic complexity of attention poses a critical bottleneck for long-context processing, spurring interest in hybrid attention designs. Most open-source hybrid models adopt a layer-wise strategy. Yet, prior work has noted the inherent difficulty of integrating Linear Attention (LA) with Full A
articles.summary: HydraHead 从注意力头级别的功能异质性出发，提出一种专业化注意力混合架构。现有混合模型多采用逐层策略，但线性注意力与全注意力在层级融合时存在内在困难；HydraHead 在头粒度进行混合，兼顾长上下文效率与建模能力，缓解全注意力的二次复杂度瓶颈。

articles.title: SkillHarness: Harnessing Safe Skills for Computer-Use Agents
articles.excerpt: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) are increasingly deployed in dynamic interactive environments, creating a growing need for continual skill learning during interaction. Recent approaches address this challenge by learning reusable skills from successful trajectories. However, these skill learning methods
articles.summary: SkillHarness 提出面向计算机操作智能体（CUA）的安全技能持续学习框架。现有方法从成功轨迹中学习可复用技能，但对安全性考量不足；SkillHarness 在动态交互环境中实现持续技能学习的同时，引入安全约束机制，满足真实部署对可靠性的更高要求。

articles.title: Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding
articles.excerpt: Autoregressive generation in large language models (LLMs) conventionally decodes from the final layer, assuming that deeper representations yield more reliable next-token predictions. We revisit this assumption by revealing a recurring Guess-Refine-Perturb dynamic: early layers form coarse guesses,
articles.summary: 该研究质疑 LLM 自回归解码始终从最后一层解码的惯例，揭示了「猜测-精炼-扰动」动态：浅层形成粗略猜测，中间层精炼，深层有时反而引入扰动。提出「置信层解码」方法，在适当中间层解码，在不降低能力的前提下减轻对齐税（alignment tax）。

articles.title: Learning from Your Own Mistakes: Constructing Learnable Micro-Reflective Trajectories for Self-Distillation
articles.excerpt: Self-distillation improves reasoning in large language models by using the model's own rollouts as training signal, typically through implicit logit-level alignment that minimizes KL divergence toward a privileged target distribution. However, because this supervision is generated via uncontrolled s
articles.summary: 该工作提出通过构建可学习的「微反思轨迹」来实现大语言模型自蒸馏，让模型从自身错误中学习。与依赖隐式 logit 级 KL 散度对齐的传统自蒸馏不同，该方法利用模型自身推理轨迹生成结构化监督信号，提升推理能力并避免无控制采样带来的噪声问题。

articles.title: Unlimited OCR Works
articles.excerpt: Recently, end-to-end OCR models, exemplified by DeepSeek OCR, have once again thrust OCR into the spotlight. A widely held view is that employing a large language model (LLM) as the decoder allows the model to leverage the prior distribution of language, leading to improved OCR performance. However,
articles.summary: 《无限 OCR 作品》重新审视以 LLM 作为解码器改善 OCR 性能的主流观点（以 DeepSeek OCR 为代表），探讨语言先验对 OCR 的实际贡献与局限，对端到端 OCR 模型的设计方向提出新的见解与分析。

articles.title: Foresight: Failure Detection for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation with Action-Conditioned World Model Latents
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon tasks are common in real-world robotic deployments, yet failure detection for such tasks remains underexplored. Detecting failures in long-horizon robotic tasks is particularly challenging because failure onset is often ambiguous and dense temporal annotations are typically unavailable.
